subject: Automating your leasing workflow
body:
Hi,

I noticed PMC Realty Group manages properties in the Atlanta area. The leasing process, from listing to screening to move-in, usually involves a lot of manual steps.

We help property management companies automate the leasing workflow: applications auto-trigger screening, approved tenants get welcome packets automatically, and listings update across platforms when a unit is leased.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
